# QUKO

> QUKO builds connected performance technology for canoeing, kayaking and rowing. Its ecosystem combines Kosoku sensor hardware, Quko Live real-time telemetry and Quko Cloud analysis for athletes, coaches, researchers and data analysts.

## Products

- [Kosoku](https://quko.es/kosoku/): 100 Hz on-boat motion capture, dual-band positioning, live transmission and compatible physiological sensors.
- [Quko Live](https://quko.es/quko_live/): Offline real-time telemetry for up to nine athletes over a 150 metre range.
- [Quko Cloud](https://quko.es/quko_cloud/): Sport-specific charts, comparisons, 3D and video review, mechanical analysis, an AI data analyst, structured exports and secure connections to compatible assistants such as ChatGPT and Claude.
- [Access Quko Cloud](https://cloud.quko.es/): Authenticated application for working with QUKO sessions.

## Company

- [Technology](https://quko.es/service/): Sensor hardware, embedded firmware, wireless telemetry, cloud software, sports analytics and open integrations.
- [About](https://quko.es/about/): QUKO's research-led engineering approach.
- [FAQ](https://quko.es/faq/): Product, data and access questions.
- [Request a demo](https://quko.es/contact/): Product demonstrations and tailored proposals.
- [Performance Lab](https://quko.es/blog/): Applied sports-performance research.
- [University research](https://quko.es/contact/): Device access, study setup support, structured data and technical integrations for field and laboratory projects.

The site is available in English, Spanish at `/es/`, and Galician at `/gl/`.
